channel.title: Pancreas on PepsFeeder
channel.description: Recent content in Pancreas on PepsFeeder

item.title: Metabolic Health After 30: Belly Fat, Diabetes, and the Hidden Role of Processed Foods
item.author: support@pepsfeeder.com (Chris Mano)
item.description: 7 foods useful for the health of the pancreas The pancreas plays a key role in the digestion and regulation of blood sugar levels. The pancreas produces two types of secretions: the first is excreted to the gut, where it secretes a juicer containing digestive enzymes.
